title: FAIL Engine + Composite Risk Scorer — Security Drill Grading Pipeline
description: fail_engine.py injects 10 synthetic vulnerability scenarios (Log4Shell, SQLi, SSRF, etc.) and grades detection/triage/remediation/communication scores. test_composite_risk_scorer.py clusters here validating grade boundaries. Gap: drill results are stored but not fed back into the security metrics engine to track improvement over time, and drills are created manually rather than scheduled periodically.
missing: Drill scheduler: monthly cron that auto-creates one drill per scenario type in round-robin fashion to ensure all 10 scenarios are tested regularly
Drill score → security metrics: when a drill is graded, write MTTD/MTTR from the drill as data points into security_metrics_engine for trend tracking
Red team → fail engine integration: route red_team_mgmt_engine exercise findings through fail_engine scoring so red team exercises get automated grades
